AIVAX
  • English
  • Português

Data Processors

AIVAX uses third-party services for specific operations such as infrastructure, object storage, email delivery, payment processing, web search, AI inference, reranking, and image generation. The providers involved in a request depend on the selected model, gateway, tool, and integration.

This page is a technical inventory, not legal advice. Provider policies may change, and Account Managers should review the provider terms that apply to their selected models and tools before sending personal, confidential, regulated, or sensitive data.

Operations, Services, and Infrastructure

Provider Used for
Cloudflare Reverse proxy/security where deployed, Workers AI reranking, and embedding services
Backblaze Object and file storage for generated media, uploaded media, generated documents, exposed files, and error artifacts
Brevo Transactional email and notifications
InfinitePay Payment invoice creation and payment confirmation
Stripe Payment event processing where Stripe checkout is configured
Twitter/X Built-in X/Twitter search and post reading tools
Linkup Web search for context enrichment
Tavily Web search for context enrichment
Sinkin AI Image generation for selected image models
Pollinations Image generation for selected image models

Direct Inference, Embedding, and Reranking Providers

Provider Used for
Groq LLM inference through an OpenAI-compatible endpoint
DeepInfra LLM inference through an OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Vultr LLM inference through Vultr Inference
CrofAI LLM inference through an OpenAI-compatible endpoint
OpenRouter Model routing and fallback for many model families and Grok Voice TTS
Xiaomi MiMo Xiaomi model inference
NagaAI LLM inference, embeddings, TTS, and selected research flows
Inception Labs Mercury model inference
Cloudflare Workers AI Smart reranking and embedding services

Model Families and Underlying Providers

The model catalog also identifies model families or underlying providers that may be selected directly or reached through aggregators such as OpenRouter or NagaAI. Not every request is sent to every provider.

Provider Used for
OpenAI OpenAI model families exposed in the catalog or compatible integrations
Google Vertex AI Gemini and other Google model families
Anthropic Claude model families
AWS AWS-hosted model families such as Amazon Nova or Bedrock-backed providers
Cohere Cohere model families
xAI Grok model families and Grok Voice through configured routes
Mistral AI Mistral model families
DeepSeek DeepSeek model families
Z.ai GLM/Z.ai model families
Alibaba Cloud Qwen/Alibaba model families
Cerebras Cerebras model families
Nebius Nebius-backed model families
Fireworks AI Fireworks-backed model families
Novita Novita-backed model families
Azure Azure-backed model families
LongCat LongCat/Meituan model family metadata

Data Handling Notes

AIVAX does not use Account Manager Input Content, Generated Content, or Conversations to train proprietary AIVAX models.

Third-party providers and aggregators may have their own processing, retention, abuse-monitoring, and model-improvement rules. The selected model, provider, tool, or integration determines which third party receives data for a specific request.

Avoid sending sensitive, confidential, regulated, or personal information to a provider unless you have reviewed that provider's current terms and have an appropriate legal basis for the processing.
